positive.stdout:

% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~appears_today(james)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    james != other_employee).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
    define works_remote(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define has_lunch_home(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define has_lunch_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define goes_to_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_james_lunch
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~appears_today(james)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u43,negated_conjecture,
    works_remote(james)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~employee(X0) | has_lunch_home(X0) | has_lunch_building(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~works_remote(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    james != other_employee).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_home(X0) | ~employee(X0) | works_remote(X0)).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_lunch_building(james)).

cnf(u41,negated_conjecture,
    has_lunch_home(james)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    employee(james)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define goes_to_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
